report.summary: Quiet cycle — no new commits since 21aaf5b (batch deploy). 571 published slugs, ~105 legacy backlog without page.tsx. All 6 API routes present with correct cache TTLs. 30+ new learn pages and OG images staged but uncommitted. No regressions.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 571 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES — ~466 have matching page.tsx, 105 missing (legacy content backlog, unchanged)
567 pages remain in PUBLISH_QUEUE — next batch ready for promotion
30+ new learn guide pages built and staged (uncommitted): ai-agent-frameworks, aptos-blockchain, defi-insurance, desci, gamblefi, initia, paradex, perp-dex-wars, and more
40+ new OG image SVGs created (uncommitted) for recent guides
TS errors remain pre-existing (ignoreBuildErrors: true) — no new regressions
Live HTTP verification unavailable (egress proxy blocked degen0x.com)
No code regressions detected in diff — changes are additive only

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes verified present: prices (60s TTL), trending (300s), fear-greed (600s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (variable)
Cache-Control headers properly configured with stale-while-revalidate on all routes
defi-yields has circuit breaker pattern (5-fail threshold) — most robust route
Only market-dominance has explicit FALLBACK_DATA — other routes rely on stale cache as fallback
ONGOING: 0/6 public API routes use the rate-limiter module (only /api/health uses it)
No API route code changes this cycle — data layer stable

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest commit 21aaf5b (batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages) is HEAD
No new commits since last deploy — production matches HEAD
30+ uncommitted learn pages + OG images are staged in working tree, awaiting commit+deploy
Modified files include: published-pages.ts, globals.css, NotificationCenter, WhaleAlertFeed, 12 learn guides updated
Build config stable: standalone output, 8GB heap, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4
Middleware unchanged — pillar pages set and cache headers intact

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Last shipped: Sprint 59 batch deploy (170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes)
In progress: 30+ new learn guides built but uncommitted (ai-agent-frameworks, aptos, defi-insurance, desci, gamblefi, etc.)
Carry-over: 105 published slugs without page.tsx files (legacy backlog — needs content generation or depublishing)
Carry-over: Rate limiter integration for public API routes (0/6 protected)
Carry-over: Fallback data missing on 5/6 API routes (only market-dominance has it)
ACTION NEEDED: Commit and deploy the 30+ staged learn pages + OG images
No blockers requiring Jefe's immediate attention — next step is commit+deploy cycle
